about_subtitle: Dr. Sheban is a skilled and compassionate dentist offering comprehensive and personalized dental care using the latest technology. At Dr. Sheban's Dental Clinic, we prioritize patient comfort and satisfaction, providing a wide range of services from preventive care to advanced treatments. Our welcoming environment and dedicated team ensure each patient receives individualized attention, helping them achieve optimal oral health and a beautiful smile.
our_works_subtitle: Showcasing our commitment to excellence through successful treatments and satisfied smiles
restorative_tentistry_subtitle: Rebuilding damaged teeth for a healthy smile.
orthodontic_success_subtitle: Achieving alignment and perfection with braces and aligners.
dental_implants_subtitle: Providing secure and natural-looking tooth replacements.

our_services_subtitle: We provide comprehensive dental services, including preventive care, restorative treatments, and cosmetic procedures. Our skilled team uses advanced technology to deliver high-quality, personalized care in a comfortable setting
comprehensive_dental_check_ups_subtitle: Detailed examinations and diagnostics to assess and maintain your oral health, including screenings for cavities, gum disease, and other dental issues.
routine_cleanings_subtitle: Essential for maintaining oral hygiene and preventing dental issues
oral_examinations_subtitle: Comprehensive evaluations to detect cavities, gum disease, and other concerns
x_ray_diagnostics_subtitle: Detailed imaging to uncover hidden dental issues beneath the surface.
oral_cancer_screenings_subtitle: Early detection and assessment for oral cancer signs and symptoms.
advanced_dental_treatments_subtitle: Offering state-of-the-art procedures, including fillings, root canals, and cosmetic enhancements, to restore and beautify your smile with precision and care.
patient_centered_care_subtitle: Providing personalized dental services in a comfortable, friendly environment, with a focus on patient comfort and satisfaction throughout your treatment journey.
orthodontic_care_subtitle: Experience the transformative power of a perfect smile. Our gentle and effective orthodontic treatments are tailored to your unique needs, delivering stunning results that boost your confidence and overall well-being.
expert_care_subtitle: Our team of highly skilled and experienced dental professionals is dedicated to providing top-quality care tailored to your individual needs.
state_of_the_art_facilities_subtitle: We use the latest technology and modern equipment to ensure precise diagnostics and effective treatments, all in a comfortable and welcoming environment.
comprehensive_services_subtitle: From routine check-ups and cleanings to advanced procedures and cosmetic enhancements, we offer a full range of dental services to meet all your oral health needs.
patient_centered_approach_subtitle: We prioritize your comfort and convenience, offering flexible appointment scheduling, personalized treatment plans, and compassionate care every step of the way.
contact_us_subtitle: We’re here to assist you! Whether you have questions, need to schedule an appointment, or want to provide feedback, feel free to reach out to us via phone, email, or our convenient online form. Your satisfaction is our priority.
location_subtitle: Located at Erbil-40 meter street-brayati street-near Aya Market, we’re easy to find and accessible for all your dental needs. Drop by and experience our exceptional care in a welcoming environment
our_mission_subtitle: Our mission is to deliver top-quality dental care with a focus on patient comfort and satisfaction. We use advanced technology and personalized treatment plans to ensure excellent oral health. Your smile is our priority, and we are committed to making every visit a positive experience.
our_vision_subtitle: Our vision is to be a leading dental practice in Erbil, known for our commitment to patient care and cutting-edge treatments. We aim to create a welcoming environment where every patient feels valued and receives the best possible dental care. Our goal is to continuously innovate and set new standards in dental excellence.
